has with CMS. 

This field is a key that links Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

FILE(S): Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 

VALUES: 3-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: You need to know both the Part D contract number (variable called CONTRACT_ID) and plan benefit 
package identifier in order to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries.
